comparison_to_alphafold.agreement: ESMFold and AlphaFold agree well on the overall KRAS G12D fold (RMSD 1.1 Å). Both identify Switch I/II as flexible and C-terminal as disordered. ESMFold is slightly less confident overall but reaches the same structural conclusions.

summary.verdict: ESMFold independently confirms the KRAS G12D fold in 12 seconds (vs minutes for AlphaFold). The 1.1 Å backbone RMSD to AlphaFold validates structural consistency across prediction methods. Both models agree on Switch I/II flexibility — this is a real structural feature, not a prediction artifact.
